thread.title: Trump's intel pick was placed on government watch list for overseas travel and foreign connections
thread.title_full: Trump's intel pick was placed on government watch list for overseas travel and foreign connections

title: Trump's intel pick was placed on government watch list for overseas travel and foreign connections
text: Source: CNNTulsi Gabbard, Donald Trumps pick to lead the intelligence community, was briefly placed on a Transportation Security Administration list that prompts additional security screening before flights after her overseas travel patterns and foreign connections triggered a government algorithm earlier this year, three sources familiar with the matter told CNN. Gabbard was quickly removed from the list, a little-known program called Quiet Skies, after going public with claims she had been added to a secret terror watchlist. Gabbard has claimed she was put on the list because she had criticized then-presidential candidate Kamala Harris in an interview with Fox News something two of the sources flatly denied had anything to do with it. The TSA placed me on the Quiet Skies domestic terror watchlist in what I can only describe as the ultimate betrayal, she said in a post on X in September. The Harris-Biden regime has now labeled me a domestic terror threat. Why? They see me as a threat to their power.Read more: https://www.google.com/amp/s/amp.cnn.com/cnn/2024/11/22/politics/tulsi-gabbard-government-watch-list-travel-connections
